'''鈭歞-s-ng-sh''' ('''kadasngeshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ringbark|ringbark]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-s-ng-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ringbark|ringbark]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞-s-ng-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kadasngeshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidasngeshoko|thidasngeshoko]] || [[word:jidasngeshoko|jidasngeshoko]] || [[word:shidasngeshoko|shidasngeshoko]] || [[word:kidasngeshoko|kidasngeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudasngeshoko|thuthudasngeshoko]] || [[word:jujudasngeshoko|jujudasngeshoko]] || [[word:shushudasngeshoko|shushudasngeshoko]] || [[word:kukudasngeshoko|kukudasngeshoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodasngeshoko|thodasngeshoko]] || [[word:jodasngeshoko|jodasngeshoko]] || [[word:shodasngeshoko|shodasngeshoko]] || [[word:kodasngeshoko|kodasngeshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodasngeshoko|thodasngeshoko]] || [[word:jodasngeshoko|jodasngeshoko]] || [[word:shodasngeshoko|shodasngeshoko]] || [[word:kodasngeshoko|kodasngeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dasngeshoko|th忙dasngeshoko]] || [[word:j忙dasngeshoko|j忙dasngeshoko]] || [[word:sh忙dasngeshoko|sh忙dasngeshoko]] || [[word:k忙dasngeshoko|k忙dasngeshoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadasngeshoko|thadasngeshoko]] || [[word:jadasngeshoko|jadasngeshoko]] || [[word:shadasngeshoko|shadasngeshoko]] || [[word:kadasngeshoko|kadasngeshoko]]
|}
